message.content:
Please read `D:\Claude Code\poc\wooricapital\src\search_data.js` and `D:\Claude Code\poc\wooricapital\src\common.js` in full and report:

1. The full structure of `SEARCH_QUERIES` array — each entry's fields (id, label, keywords, description, etc.)
2. The full structure of `SEARCH_RESULTS` object — each entry's fields (queryId, title, description, cars array with each car's fields)
3. How many entries in each, and what the query IDs are
4. In common.js: the full `showNoResults()` function and `createSearchResultSection()` function — exact current code

This is needed to plan new features for comparison-user search data.

content.text: I'll read both files in full for you.

content.text:
Perfect! I have read both files in full. Here's my comprehensive report: --- ## 1. SEARCH_QUERIES Array Structure **Total Entries: 5** Each entry has these fields: - `id` - Query identifier (string: "result_01" through "result_05") - `label` - User-friendly search phrase (Korean text) - `keywords` - Array of keyword strings for matching - `description` - Short description of the result set **Query IDs and Details:** | ID | Label | Keywords Count | Description | |---|---|---|---| | result_01 | "연비 좋은 SUV 추천해줘" | 13 keywords | "연비 특화 하이브리드 SUV 추천" | | result_02 | "고성능 세단 보여줘" | 13 keywords | "고성능 퍼포먼스 세단 추천" | | result_03 | "가족이랑 탈 7인승 차" | 13 keywords | "패밀리카 대형 SUV 추천" | | result_04 | "수입차 중에 뭐가 좋아?" | 12 keywords | "수입 브랜드 추천" | | result_05 | "3천만원대 국산차" | 12 keywords | "합리적 가격 국산차 추천" | --- ## 2. SEARCH_RESULTS Object Structure **Total Entries: 5** (one per query ID) Each entry follows this structure: ``` "result_XX": { "queryId": "result_XX", "title": "한글 제목", "description": "한글 설명", "cars": [ { "img": "image_key", "brand": "BRAND_NAME", "name": "차량명 (HTML
포함 가능)", "spec": "엔진/사양 정보", "price": "가격 (한글 숫자)", "sub": "월 할부 약 XXXX원 (60개월)", "tag": "태그 (HEV/국산/수입/수입HEV)", "tagC": "CSS 클래스 (tag-h/tag-k/tag-i)", "highlight": "강조 포인트" }, ... ] } ``` **Cars per result set:** - result_01: 4 cars (Sorento HEV, Tucson HEV, NX 350h, Santafe HEV) - result_02: 4 cars (G80, BMW 5시리즈, K8, Grandeur) - result_03: 3 cars (Sorento HEV, Santafe HEV, Tucson HEV) - result_04: 2 cars (BMW 5시리즈, NX 350h) - result_05: 4 cars (Tucson HEV, Santafe HEV, Sorento HEV, K8) **Total cars across all results: 17 car listings** (with overlapping models across different query sets) **Available car image keys:** g80, bmw5, k8, grandeur, sorento, tucson, nx350h, santafe --- ## 3. common.js Functions - Exact Current Code ### showNoResults() Function (Lines 167-196) ```javascript /** * 검색 결과 없음 표시 */ function showNoResults(keywords) { const resultsContainer = document.getElementById('search-results-container'); if (!resultsContainer) return; const recommendedSection = document.getElementById('recommended-section'); if (recommendedSection) { recommendedSection.style.display = 'none'; } resultsContainer.innerHTML = `
🔍
"${keywords.join(' ')}"에 맞는 검색 결과가 없습니다.
다른 검색어를 시도해보세요.
추천 검색어:
${searchQueries.map(q => `
${q.description}
`).join('')}
`; resultsContainer.style.display = 'block'; } ``` ### createSearchResultSection() Function (Lines 127-162) ```javascript /** * 검색 결과 섹션 HTML 생성 (car-grid 2열 형식) */ function createSearchResultSection(resultData, score) { const section = document.createElement('div'); section.className = 'search-result-section'; section.innerHTML = `

${resultData.title}

${resultData.description}

${resultData.cars.map(car => `
${car.tag}
${car.brand}
${car.name}
${car.spec}
${car.price}
${car.sub}
★ ${car.highlight}
`).join('')}
`; return section; } ``` --- ## Summary for Feature Planning The system is well-structured for search comparison features: - **5 predefined search categories** across fuel efficiency, performance, family vehicles, imports, and budget options - **Keyword-based matching** with scoring in `performSearch()` (line 58-89) - **17 total car listings** reused across multiple result contexts - **Car card structure** includes all comparison-relevant fields: brand, spec, price, monthly payment, fuel economy, and highlighted advantages - `createSearchResultSection()` dynamically renders grid layouts, making it suitable for side-by-side car comparisons - `showNoResults()` handles no-match cases with suggestion chips File paths: - /D:\Claude Code\poc\wooricapital\src\search_data.js - /D:\Claude Code\poc\wooricapital\src\common.js
